reviews.review_description: The game hasn’t got the best landscape and is a bit plain, but it has got a fair quality plane controls, although it hasn’t got the pedals. If you want a game to learn about the hand controls and just that basic things, use this game.
So this is one of the best flight simulators I have played but one down side the people who made the game don't make any money off of it
It’s a fun game but it’s hard to control so I crash a lot but still I would play this

If you mess with the settings in the airplane it works perfectly ( sensitivity! Up to half way!) 
No rudder assist also ! Love this I love all flight games  ( I’m learning how to make one my self so I understand this ) keep it up ur doing amazing good love all the things trees are also cool just fab ❤️🌺🌺❤️🌱🌺🌺🌱🤯🌺🎁

Bro, where the hell is the joy in this game, I do not see any joy, because there is no joy in this game, it literally says joy flight, but there is no joy in this game, you literally just crashing to the ground, and why is the home button right above the throttle, can we, our school why it is because when I push the throttle all the way to the Green Zone, it sends me back to the hanger, how more annoying can this game get? I have absolutely no idea, if you get this game, be aware that this is the most trash game you will ever play in your whole entire life, I'd spend 100 million days in hell rather than play this game, the trashiest game on meta is this, it should literally get an award for being trash, and I don't mean trash, I mean absolute trash, don't get this game, get another flight game with like a free trial or something, but by all means, don't get this game, 1 star.

This game has a plane that’s really hard to control crashes a ton like if  I get inside plane CRASH I exist? CRASH ( you get it ) also barely any content





DO NOT GET



If I could give 0
 stars I would
Id rather spend 10 millon days in hell then play this game. Even the worst app on meta is better than this app.w
